network_od_cost_matrix.description: Compute origin-destination cost matrix between point pairs. Calculates travel distance or cost along network paths.

network.label: Network line layer (roads, pathways, etc.). Represents connected paths for routing.

origins.label: Origin point layer. Starting locations for routes.

destinations.label: Destination point layer. End locations for routes (can be same as origins).

cost_attribute.label: Cost attribute field [optional]
cost_attribute.tooltip: Attribute field on network lines for custom costs (e.g., travel time, resistance). If omitted, uses line length as cost.

output.label: Output cost matrix table/file (required in QGIS). One row per origin-destination pair.

network_dijkstra_shortest_path.description: Find shortest path between pairs of nodes using Dijkstra's algorithm. Used for route planning and connectivity analysis.

cost_attribute.label: Cost attribute [optional]
cost_attribute.tooltip: Network line attribute for path costs (e.g., travel time, distance). Omit to use line length.

output.label: Output shortest path line (required in QGIS).

network_shortest_path_between_points.description: Batch compute shortest paths for multiple point pairs. Efficient for finding multiple routes through a network.

origins.label: Origin points. One path computed per origin-destination pair.

cost_attribute.label: Cost attribute [optional]
cost_attribute.tooltip: Allows custom routing costs instead of line length.

output.label: Output paths as lines (required in QGIS). One line per origin-destination pair.

linear_reference_from_points.description: Calculate linear position (measure) for points along linear features (routes, centerlines). Enables feature referencing along network.

routes.label: Linear reference features (routes, centerlines, etc.). Points will be referenced to nearest location on these lines.

points.label: Point layer to reference. Each point gets assigned measure value along nearest route.

measure_field.label: Route measure field [optional]
measure_field.tooltip: If provided, uses this field for measure values instead of distance from start. Enables custom referencing (e.g., mile-post numbers).

output.label: Output with linear reference measures added (required in QGIS).

locate_along_route_by_measure.description: Place features at specific measure positions along linear reference routes. Inverse of linear_reference_from_points.

routes.label: Linear reference features (routes). Features will be placed along these lines.

feature_data.label: Table with measure values and feature information. Must include measure column and feature ID.

measure_column.label: Column name containing measure values (distance or custom reference).
measure_column.tooltip: Values should match route measure coordinate system.

offset.label: Offset distance perpendicular to route [optional]
offset.tooltip: Positive offset places features to route's right; negative to left. Useful for displaying parallel features.

network_connectivity.description: Analyze network connectivity, identify isolated components, find articulation points (bridges).

output_nodes.label: Output network nodes (intersections and endpoints).
output_nodes.tooltip: Each unique connection point becomes a node feature. Node ID can be used for connectivity analysis.

output_edges.label: Output network edges with connectivity information.

network_distance_analysis.description: Compute distance/cost statistics from network nodes (e.g., average distance to nearest facility, service coverage).

sources.label: Source points (facilities, stations, etc.). Distance computed from these to all reachable locations.

max_distance.label: Maximum search distance [optional]
max_distance.tooltip: Limits analysis to this distance from sources. Leave empty for network-wide analysis.

output.label: Output distance raster or table (required in QGIS).
